category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an open source web server with automatic HTTPS; official docs at caddyserver.com/docs describe Caddy as a server for sites, services, and apps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README says to call it "Caddy"; source_facts.homepage is caddyserver.com.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted under caddyserver.com/docs and includes getting started and command-line pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official Caddy docs describe web serving, proxying, automatic HTTPS, and command-line usage.
